C Of Simple Mercantile Defraudment Theft Embezzlement and Fraudulent obtainment given to confinement to hard labour is that in cases_ where the profit of the cheat was trifling the quantity of this would be so small as that to a man who had already been familarized to it by experience it would scarcely be an object. As to the ignominious punishment, the use of applying it is not so much the effect it may be expected to have upon those to whom it is designed to be applied sometimesin the first instance, as upon the others to whom it is not designed to apply it but in case of a second or 3rd. offence.
